name: Idle Gold Miner
author: Poki
description: In Idle Gold Miner, you take over as the manager of a brand new gold mine! It’s up to you to invest your funds wisely and get your mine to run as efficiently and profitable as possible. You can invest in workers to make sure they work as fast as possible and hire managers to automate tasks for you and keep an eye on your workers. Spend your money wisely and watch your company grow! Can you become a gold mining tycoon? How to play Idle Gold Miner? Use the mouse to upgrade and expand your mine! Who created Idle Gold Miner? Idle Gold Miner is created by Beedo Games. Play their other games on Poki: Chicken Merge , Clash of Tanks and Call of Tanks How can I play Idle Gold Miner for free? You can play Idle Gold Miner for free on Poki. Can I play Idle Gold Miner on mobile devices and desktop? Idle Gold Miner can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
